headlines.title: Student commencement boos are a sign of wider AI woes
headlines.description: As companies race to weave AI into nearly every industry, some college students are responding with open hostility

headlines.title: Vance warns AI shouldn’t outrank humans in war
headlines.description: Vice President JD Vance said he worries about how emerging AI will be used in warfare, urging graduating Air Force cadets not to allow technology to supersede their judgment.

headlines.title: Google engineer made $1.2M placing bets on Polymarket using confidential info, prosecutors say
headlines.description: A Google software engineer was accused Wednesday of using confidential company information to make over $1.2 million on Polymarket in the second significant criminal case tied to trades on the prediction market platform.

headlines.title: Illinois Legislature passes historic AI bill that would require third-party safety audits
headlines.description: The measure goes beyond legislation in California and New York regulating America’s largest AI companies. It still needs to be signed by the governor.

headlines.title: Red-hot AI demand pushes more companies into the $1 trillion club
headlines.description: Micron Technologies and SK Hynix joined the trillion-dollar club, which includes Apple, Meta and Tesla.

headlines.title: Massive leadership vacuum weakens U.S. diplomacy in the face of global crises
headlines.description: Hundreds of diplomats have been forced to retire or were laid off in the Trump administration

headlines.title: Andy Beshear says ‘Texas is in play’ for Democrats after Paxton nomination: Full interview
headlines.description: In an exclusive interview with Meet the Press, Gov. Andy Beshear (D-Ky.) expresses his support for State Sen. James Talarico (D-Texas) who will face off with Texas Attorney General Ken Paxton for the Senate in November.

headlines.title: Graham Platner’s wife ‘angry’ her disclosures of his extramarital sexting were made public
headlines.description: The wife of Graham Platner, the presumptive Democratic nominee for the Senate in Maine, said she is “really angry” about reports that she previously told her husband’s campaign he had exchanged sexually explicit texts with other women.“It makes me really angry, disappointed,” Platner’s wife, Amy Gertner, said in a direct-to-camera video Platner’s campaign released Saturday night.

headlines.title: Mike Pence says the Trump administration has ‘departed’ from conservative principles
headlines.description: Former Vice President Mike Pence said the second administration of President Donald Trump has “departed” from traditional conservative principles in the president’s second term.

headlines.title: TikTok documentary posted by Paris Hilton digs into notorious deepfake pornography website
headlines.description: Paris Hilton and independent journalist Laurie Segall fight the rise of AI-generated deepfakes in a TikTok documentary. It investigates the man believed to be behind a notorious deepfake pornography website. NBC News’ Chloe Melas reports.

headlines.title: Video Shows Moment Blue Origin Rocket Explodes on Launchpad
headlines.description: Stunning video shows the moment Blue Origin’s New Glenn rocket erupts into flames on the launchpad in Cape Canaveral Thursday night, with the blast seen and felt for miles. No injuries were reported but the launch tower was destroyed in the explosion. NBC’s Tom Costello reports for TODAY.

headlines.title: NASA’s Jared Isaacman shares moon base plans
headlines.description: NASA Administrator Jared Isaacman talks with NBC News’ Gadi Schwartz about plans for building a base on the moon, rover designs, and what’s next for the Artemis missions.
